description: To apply for a position, please send a CV, cover letter or research statement, and information for three references to the PI, Guangyu Wang, PhD (gwang2@houstonmethodist.org).
qualifications: Applicants must have training in an area related to bioinformatics.
Experiences with algorithm development and analysis of multiple high-dimension datasets will be a strong plus.

Candidates with a PhD degree in biology, medicine, genomics, bioinformatics, computer science, electronics engineering, mathematics, statistics, physics, or other related areas are encouraged to apply.
title: Postdocs

description:
We have openings for motivated undergraduate and graduate students from various scientific disciplines (biology, medicine, statistics, engineering, etc) who wish to work at the interface of genomics, bioinformatics and medicine.

Please contact gwang2@houstonmethodist.org for more information.
title: Graduate & Undergraduate Students
